resources.string:
Terms and Conditions

Last Updated: March 2026

1. Acceptance of Terms
By accessing and using the PH 232 application, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use this application.

2. User Accounts
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to notify the administrator immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

3. Data Collection and Privacy
We collect personal information including your name, student ID, email address, and attendance records. This data is used solely for the purpose of managing attendance, events, and letter tracking within the PH 232 program.

4. Attendance Tracking
Attendance is recorded through QR code scanning. You are responsible for scanning your own QR code. Scanning on behalf of another person is strictly prohibited and may result in disciplinary action.

5. User Conduct
You agree not to:
• Share your login credentials with others
• Attempt to manipulate attendance records
• Use the application for any unlawful purpose
• Interfere with the proper functioning of the application

6. Data Retention
Your data will be retained for as long as your account is active and as required by the PH 232 program policies.

7. Modifications
We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the application after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

8. Limitation of Liability
The PH 232 application is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any damages arising from the use of this application.

9. Contact
For questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact your program administrator.

By using this application, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions.
